description: nFusion Solutions provides software and market data products for precious-metals businesses, including real-time spot-price feeds, pricing tools, charts/widgets, and related integrations. Its offerings are aimed at dealers, ecommerce businesses, wholesalers, and developers working with precious-metals pricing and order workflows.
summary: nfusionsolutions.com exposes one documented authenticated REST API on dashboard.nfusionsolutions.com, described by an OpenAPI spec and using a query-string API token; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
